message:
perf(connection,mvcc,pager,btree): sort-based GROUP BY, Arc<Statement> in prepared stmts, NOCASE collation optimization, MVCC + cache improvements

Connection (connection.rs — +191/-xx):
- Replace O(N*M) linear-scan GROUP BY grouping with sort-based approach:
  pre-sort rows by group key, then scan sequentially collecting adjacent
  equal keys — reduces grouping from quadratic to O(N log N)
- Change PreparedStatement dml_statement and deferred_query_statement
  from Option<Statement> to Option<Arc<Statement>>, eliminating expensive
  Statement clones when the same prepared statement is reused
- Thread Cx context through execute_group_by_join_select for proper
  checkpoint integration
- Optimize cmp_sqlite_values_collated NOCASE comparison from
  to_ascii_lowercase() String allocation to byte-by-byte iterator
  comparison, eliminating per-comparison heap allocation
- Pre-resolve USING constraint column indices in execute_single_join
  to avoid per-row linear col_map searches

B-tree cursor (cursor.rs): Additional test refinements and assertions
for index traversal and delete-all collapse verification

MVCC (begin_concurrent.rs, core_types.rs, hot_witness_index.rs,
lifecycle.rs, shared_lock_table.rs, ssi_anomaly_tests.rs,
ssi_validation.rs, witness_hierarchy.rs, witness_plane.rs,
witness_publication.rs):
- Enhanced shared lock table with improved contention handling
- Witness hierarchy and publication optimizations
- SSI validation refinements

Pager (arc_cache.rs): Cache eviction strategy improvements with reduced
overhead for hot-path lookups

Types (cx.rs, glossary.rs, record.rs, value.rs): Type system
improvements and glossary updates

Parser (lexer.rs): Minor lexer fix
VFS (shm.rs): Shared memory handling improvement
VDBE (engine.rs): VM engine loop refinements
E2E (comprehensive_bench.rs — +775 lines): Expanded benchmark suite

Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock: Re-add fsqlite-e2e workspace member with ftui
dependencies for comprehensive benchmarking

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
